drooler.name: The Professional Drooler
drooler.description: drooling while napping on his annoying owner's leg.
drooler.footer: the owner's leg is the official pillow 😴

fakeplants.footer: can't tell plastic from the real thing 🌿

flycatcher.description: napping with mouth open to catch flies

innovator.name: The Innovator
innovator.description: lying down in a completely unconventional way

derpy.name: Cute Derp Face
derpy.description: napping with a goofy cute face

gardener.name: The Gardener
gardener.description: sitting weird on the grass he planted with his own paws
gardener.footer: plants it, grows it, sits on it 🌱
